user.title: Connect to LabTether Hub
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to an existing LabTether hub. Use the hub URL and an API key with access to assets, metrics, alerts, and actions. Enable the TLS toggle only when you intentionally trust a self-signed hub certificate.

import_options.title: Choose What To Import
import_options.description: Preview for {host_label}: {asset_count} assets, {telemetry_asset_count} telemetry-capable assets, {switchable_asset_count} controllable assets, {alerts_count} active alerts. Visible sources: {sources_label}. Choose which entities and services Home Assistant should create.

review.title: Review Setup

reconfigure.title: Update LabTether Connection
reconfigure.description: Update the Home Assistant connection details for this LabTether hub.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to LabTether
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication to {host} failed. Enter a fresh API key to restore the LabTether integration.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the LabTether hub. Check the URL, API key, and network path.
error.invalid_auth: The LabTether API key was rejected.
error.invalid_url: Enter a full hub URL starting with http:// or https://.
error.tls_error: TLS validation failed. If you intentionally use a self-signed hub certificate, enable the ignore-certificate toggle and try again.

abort.already_configured: This LabTether hub is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: The LabTether connection was reauthenticated successfully.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The LabTether connection was updated successfully.

init.title: LabTether Options
init.description: Adjust polling, imported entity types, the action service, and TLS behavior for this LabTether connection.
